CompactTableEntry.description: Per-table compaction plan inside a `--catalog` envelope.

CompactTotals.description: Aggregate counts over a `rocky compact --catalog` invocation.

NamedStatement.description: Named SQL statement (purpose + sql), reused by compact and archive.

description:
JSON output for `rocky compact`.

Two shapes share this struct:

- **Single-model (`rocky compact <fqn>`)**: `model` is set; `scope`, `catalog`, `tables`, and `totals` are absent. Byte-stable with envelopes that predate the catalog-scope flag. - **Catalog scope (`rocky compact --catalog <name>`)**: `model` is absent, `scope = "catalog"`, `catalog` is set, `tables` keys per-FQN statement bundles, and `totals` carries aggregate counts. The flat `statements` field still carries every SQL statement across all tables for consumers that just iterate it.

catalog.description: Set when invoked as `rocky compact --catalog <name>`. Stores the catalog identifier as resolved (lowercased to match the managed-table resolver's normalization).

scope.description: `"catalog"` for the catalog-scoped path; absent for single-model invocations to keep their envelope byte-stable.

statements.description: Flat list of every SQL statement across every table. Single-model invocations have one bundle here; `--catalog` invocations have the concatenation of every per-table bundle (in the same order as `tables`'s key iteration order).

tables.description: Per-table breakdown, keyed by fully-qualified table name. Present only on `--catalog` invocations.

totals.description: Aggregate counts across the catalog. Present only on `--catalog` invocations.

title: CompactOutput
